About: It is about a type of textile weave with a pattern of parallel, diagonal ribs.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with plain weave and satin.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a pattern of parallel, diagonal ribs.
HasA: It has a pattern of parallel, diagonal ribs.
It has a "step", or offset, between rows to create the characteristic diagonal pattern.
It has a technical face and a technical back.
It has interesting texture and design.
It has fewer interlacings as compared with other weaves.
It has higher counts, including high-count twills.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by parallel, diagonal ribs.
It is characterized by a "step", or offset, between rows.
It is characterized by distinct diagonal lines.
It is characterized by a pronounced wale on the technical face.
It is characterized by fewer interlacings.
It is characterized by diagonal lines.
IsA: It is one of three fundamental types of weave.
It is a type of textile weave.
It is a warp face twill weave.
It is a weft face twill weave.
It is a double face twill weave.
It is a simple twill weave.
It is an expanded twill weave.
It is a multiple twill weave.
It is an even-sided twill.
It is a warp-faced twill.
It is a weft-faced twill.
KnownAs: It is known as a wale.
KnownFor: It is known for draping well.
It is known for its durability.
It is known for its wrinkle-resistance.
It is known for its low maintenance.
It is known for being softer and more pliable than plain-weave textiles.
It is known for recovering from creasing better than plain-weave fabrics.
It is known for producing high-count fabrics.
It is known for being air- and water-resistant when high-count.
PartOf: It is part of three fundamental types of weave.
UsedAs: It is used as sturdy work clothing.
It is used as durable upholstery.
UsedFor: It is used for sturdy work clothing.
It is used for durable upholstery.
UsedIn: It is used in lightweight fabrics when printed.
It is used in high-count fabrics.
UsedTo: It is used to create the characteristic diagonal pattern.
